title: DonutSMP Ultimate Modpack
description: DonutSMP Modpack for Optimization, PVP, Exploration, and Building. This pack adds mods that keep everything vanilla, while giving you the advantage in any situation.
body:
##

About

This is a Vanilla modpack that adds helpful and popular mods for exploration, PVP, AFKing, optimization, and even building! It includes mods that give you the advantage in any situation and won't get you banned! This adds Iris + Sodium for shaders, Simple Voice Chat for communication, Low Fire and Freelook for PVP, Auto Reconnect Reforged for AFKing, and many more! Why spend hours searching for all the best mods when you can download all of them with one click?



If we hit 250 downloads I will add more DonutSMP supported minecraft versions!! Since the DonutSMP update came out, I might add more mods! If you would like to stay updated, then why not follow this modpack? It will send notifications anytime it is changed!


Full Mod List - AppleSkin - Auto Reconnect Reforged - Cloth Config API - Collective - Complementary Shaders - Reimagined - Continuity - Crosshair Addons Public - Enchantment Descriptions - Essential Mod - Fabric API - FerriteCore - Freelook - Iris Shaders - Litematica - Lithium - Low Fire - MaLiLib - Minimal Status Effect Timer - Mod Menu - ModListMemory - More Chat History - Prickle - Puzzle - Screencopy - Shulker Box Tooltip - Simple Durability Tooltip - Simple Voice Chat - Sodium - Text Placeholder API - uku's Armor HUD - ukulib - WalksyLib - YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)
